questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to govern hundreds of accounts with SCPs and OU structure. Which solution is BEST? govern hundreds of accounts with SCPs and OU structure.
While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must establish landing zones with guardrails. Which action is appropriate? establish landing zones with guardrails.
After a design review, leadership requires the team to share subnets across accounts securely. Which approach is MOST reliable? share subnets across accounts securely.
questions.explanation: RAM shares VPC subnets for shared services.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must centralize DNS and hybrid resolution. What should they do FIRST? centralize DNS and hybrid resolution.
questions.explanation: Resolver rules route DNS between on-prem and VPC.

questions.text: Operations reports a need to implement network hub-and-spoke at scale. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution? implement network hub-and-spoke at scale.
questions.explanation: Transit Gateway connects VPCs and on-prem.

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to enforce service control for regulated workloads without changing application code. What should you implement? enforce service control for regulated workloads.
questions.explanation: SCPs limit maximum permissions per OU.
